center.name: 西北夏威夷群島
center.summary: 西北夏威夷群島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括短尾信天翁、黑腹军舰鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Both Midway and Kure are in the Northwestern Hawaiian Islands.{{cite web |title=Nest of endangered albatross found in Hawaii

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Hawaii is the northernmost extent of their range in the Pacific Ocean, with around 10,000 pairs nesting mostly in the Northwestern Hawaiian Islands
